channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What to Do When Your Claim Is Denied
Taking the heat. Scientists explore sauna's health benefits
item.description: It's an age old practice that's having a moment right now. But is there anything to the health claims? Scientists say sauna is more than hot air.

item.title: How to Choose the Best Health Plan
'Dopamine Kids' explains why children crave screens and helps them enjoy life instead
item.description: A mom and science writer offers an operating manual for parents grappling with kids' screen use and cravings for sweets.

item.title: Strategies for Smarter Health Spending
item.description: Learn how to choose the right plan and navigate health insurance with confidence at every stage of life.

item.title: Working Out At This Time Of Day Could Reduce Insulin Resistance Up To 25%
item.description: Clear your schedule this afternoon; it's time to work out!

item.title: This Super-Satisfying Exercise Can Help Improve Posture & Stretch Your Achy Hips
item.description: There are so many benefits to bow pose.

item.title: Research Points To 2 Ways Sleep Is Essential To Brain Health
item.description: Add this to all the other important reasons to prioritize your rest.

item.title: 5 Expert-Backed Habits For Stress Resilience & Longevity
item.description: Five expert-backed habits and targeted nutrients can help improve your body's stress response and support longevity.

item.title: This Zodiac Sign Gossips The Most Out Of AnyoneâIs It Yours?
Can a digital tablet cut back a country's overuse of antibiotics?
item.description: Overprescribing antibiotics breeds antibiotic resistance. A new tool aims to lower a notably high rate of such prescriptions in Rwanda.

item.title: Medical schools agree to expand their nutrition curriculum this fall
item.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. announced that 53 medical schools in 31 states will expand their nutrition curriculum to 40 hours. Most medical...

item.title: Pregnant women in ERs took less Tylenol after Trump autism warning
item.description: A study in The Lancet finds that pregnant women in emergency rooms used less Tylenol after President Trump said it could raise their babies' risk of a...
